remarks: Charming basement studio apartment with a private entrance and patio! Enjoy your own private patio with direct access to a beautiful shared backyard, offering a peaceful outdoor space to relax. The apartment features a kitchen with a pantry closet, a large closet/storage area, and an in-unit washer and dryer. Heat, hot water, and trash removal are included in the rent. Tenant is responsible for electricity. Off-street paved parking is included.
